EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Enum esriPEWKTMode

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Flags of the mask to pass to the WKT string in IPEWKTExport.

[Guid("31BF7B27-02B3-4A95-BDAB-2891F03F9585")]
public enum esriPEWKTMode

Fields

esriPEWKTMode_AuthAll = 2

2: Include auth in all objects

esriPEWKTMode_AuthTop = 1

1: Include auth in top-level obj only

esriPEWKTMode_AuthVersion = 4

4: Include authority version

esriPEWKTMode_DisplayNameAll = 32

32: Include disp name in all objects

esriPEWKTMode_DisplayNameCanonical = 128

128: Use canonical (internal) name

esriPEWKTMode_DisplayNameTop = 16

16: Include disp name in top-level obj

esriPEWKTMode_Fallback = 2097152

2097152: Output string in WKT format if possible, otherwise WKT2 (default)

esriPEWKTMode_FormattedWithSpaces = 256

256: Multiple line with space indents

esriPEWKTMode_FormattedWithTabs = 512

512: Multiple line with tab indents

esriPEWKTMode_LegacyPrecision = 33554432

33554432: Legacy digit precision

esriPEWKTMode_NoMetadata = 32768

32768: Exclude metadata from string

esriPEWKTMode_Proj4 = 262144

262144: Output string in PROJ4 format

esriPEWKTMode_WKT = 65536

65536: Output string in WKT format

esriPEWKTMode_WKT2 = 1048576

1048576: Output string in PROJ4 format

Made with docfx
